name: PIERROT base-prior sample grid prompts
description: PIERROT 의 step 별 샘플 그리드(LAB/0.8b.md, LAB/1.6b.md)를 만들 때 사용한 60개 프롬프트. base prior 학습셋의 캡션 스타일을 흉내 내어 새로 작성한 것이며, 학습 캡션을 복사한 것이 아니다.

prompts.prompt: A photorealistic image of two children building a sandcastle on a sunny beach while a small dog watches nearby.
A cozy scene of an elderly couple sharing tea at a wooden kitchen table, warm morning light streaming through the window.
A group of friends gathered around a campfire at night, roasting marshmallows under a starry sky.
A serene image of a woman reading a book in a hammock strung between two palm trees on a tropical island.
A bustling street food market at dusk, vendors grilling skewers while crowds browse colorful stalls.
A photorealistic image of three coworkers brainstorming around a whiteboard in a bright modern office.
A young man playing an acoustic guitar on a rooftop terrace overlooking a city skyline at sunset.
A family of four hiking along a forest trail in autumn, surrounded by golden falling leaves.
A chef and two assistants preparing dishes in a busy restaurant kitchen filled with rising steam.
A group of cyclists riding along a coastal road with the ocean shimmering in the background.
A mother and daughter baking cookies together in a sunlit kitchen, flour dusting the counter.
A photorealistic image of a fisherman pulling in his net from a small wooden boat at dawn.
Two scientists examining samples in a laboratory, wearing white coats under bright lights.
A street artist painting a vibrant mural on a brick wall while pedestrians pass by.
A couple dancing in an empty ballroom lit by a grand crystal chandelier.
A rustic wooden bookshelf overflowing with leather-bound books, a brass reading lamp casting a warm glow on a worn armchair beside it.
A vintage motorcycle parked outside a weathered garage, its chrome handlebars gleaming under the afternoon sun, oil stains marking the concrete floor.
A delicate porcelain teacup filled with jasmine tea resting on a saucer beside a small plate of almond cookies on a lace tablecloth.
A grand piano positioned in the corner of a sunlit conservatory, surrounded by potted ferns and tall windows draped with sheer curtains.
A weathered fishing pier extending into a calm lake at sunrise, mist hovering above the water and a single rowboat tied to a post.
An antique globe on a mahogany desk cluttered with ink pens, folded maps, and a magnifying glass beneath a green banker's lamp.
A market stall brimming with ripe tomatoes, leafy greens, and baskets of citrus, a handwritten chalkboard listing the day's prices.
A cobblestone courtyard with a stone fountain at its center, ivy climbing the surrounding walls and wrought-iron lanterns glowing softly.
A cluttered artist's studio with half-finished canvases leaning against the walls, brushes soaking in jars and sunlight pouring through a skylight.
A snow-covered village street lined with timber houses, warm light spilling from frosted windows and a wreath hanging on every door.
A tray of freshly glazed donuts arranged in neat rows behind a bakery's glass display case, soft overhead lighting catching the sugar.
A greenhouse filled with blooming orchids of every color, water droplets clinging to the glass panes and a watering can resting on a bench.
A worn leather suitcase covered in travel stickers sitting on a train platform as steam drifts past an arriving vintage locomotive.
A quiet library reading room with rows of green-shaded lamps, tall arched windows and a spiral staircase leading to the upper shelves.
A campsite at the edge of an alpine lake, a canvas tent pitched beside a crackling fire with mountains reflected in the still water.
Minimalist ceramic coffee mug on a white background
Handmade wool scarf in warm autumn colors
Vintage film camera with a worn leather strap
Modern scandinavian living room interior design

Three potted succulents on a bright windowsill
Aerial view of a winding coastal highway
Cozy reading nook with warm fairy lights
Freshly brewed espresso in a small glass cup
Hand-drawn botanical illustration of ferns
Stack of vintage suitcases used as home decor
